name: Pierhouse Key Lime Pie from Chef Freddy
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Beat the egg yolks until they are pale yellow.
3. Pour in the milk and cream of tartar at the same time and beat on medium speed of an electric mixer for 5 minutes.
4. Add the lime juice and mix for 5 more minutes. Do not overmix.
5. Pour the mixture into a 9-inch Graham cracker pie shell placed on a cookie sheet. Bake for 15 minutes or until the pie turns light in color. Refrigerate.
6. For the topping, add ingredients to a saucepan and bring to a boil. Lower heat and simmer until the sauce is golden brown. Refrigerate until thick. Pour over the key lime pie before serving.
7. This pie will keep in the refrigerator for 3 days.
